ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authorization_objects" (
  "auth_object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authorization object */,
  "auth_object_name" TEXT /* Name of the authorization object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the authorization object */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the authorization object */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the authorization object is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authorization_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "auth_object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated authorization object */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the authorization field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the authorization field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (text, number, etc.) */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the field is mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorization_fields_auth_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_object_id") REFERENCES authorization_objects ("auth_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authorization_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated field */,
  "value" TEXT /* Possible value for the authorization field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorization_values_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES authorization_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_fields" (
  "activity_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity field */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the field is hidden from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity field */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the activity is critical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_field_id") REFERENCES activity_fields ("activity_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the role is the default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_authorizations" (
  "role_auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role authorization mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated role */,
  "auth_object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the authorization object */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity associated with the authorization */,
  "is_allowed" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the activity is allowed for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_authorizations_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_authorizations_auth_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_object_id") REFERENCES authorization_objects ("auth_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_authorizations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user took */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity was performed */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the activity (success or failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_audit" (
  "role_audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role audit log entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being audited */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_audit_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_audit" (
  "activity_audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity audit log entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being audited */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the changes were made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the activity */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_audit_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authorization_object_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchical relationship */,
  "parent_auth_object_id" INTEGER /* Parent authorization object ID */,
  "child_auth_object_id" INTEGER /* Child authorization object ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorization_object_hierarchy_child_auth_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_auth_object_id") REFERENCES authorization_objects ("auth_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorization_object_hierarchy_parent_auth_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_auth_object_id") REFERENCES authorization_objects ("auth_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authorization_field_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency relationship */,
  "dependent_field_id" INTEGER /* Dependent field ID */,
  "independent_field_id" INTEGER /* Independent field ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorization_field_dependencies_independent_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("independent_field_id") REFERENCES authorization_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorization_field_dependencies_dependent_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_field_id") REFERENCES authorization_fields ("field_id")
)
